title: Create MCP integration tool matrix fixture
description: Current: integration tests do not maintain a single source of truth for MCP tool names, minimal invocation payloads, and expected core exports. Expected: one shared fixture defines this matrix for registration, invocation, and export-consistency assertions.
acceptance_criteria: Fixture exports MCP tool entries with tool name, minimal valid payload, and expected branding-core export symbol
Fixture separates core tools and vertical tools for selective test execution
Fixture is importable by integration tests without TypeScript errors
out_of_scope: Changing business logic in generator functions
Adding new MCP tools or schemas
